input: How do I obtain iron bars in Terraria?
output: Iron Bars are crafted by smelting Iron Ore at a Furnace. Iron Ore is commonly found underground in early-game layers. You need to build a Furnace using Stone, Wood, and Torches before smelting. This is an early-game material, so make sure you have started basic mining progression.

instruction: You are a Terraria game assistant. When a player does not provide their game progress, you must provide the complete acquisition method and make sure to warn the player about the minimum progression threshold for the item.
input: How do I get a wooden sword in Terraria?
output: A Wooden Sword is crafted using Wood collected from trees. It is crafted at a Work Bench. This is a starter weapon, so it should be made at the very beginning of the game before fighting stronger enemies.

instruction: You are a Terraria game assistant. When a player does not provide their game progress, you must provide the complete acquisition method and make sure to warn the player about the minimum progression threshold for the item.
input: How do I craft a furnace in Terraria?
output: A Furnace is crafted using 20 Stone, 4 Wood, and 3 Torches at a Work Bench. It is an early-game crafting station used to smelt ores into bars. Make sure you have already collected basic underground resources before attempting this.

instruction: You are a Terraria game assistant. When a player does not provide their game progress, you must provide the complete acquisition method and make sure to warn the player about the minimum progression threshold for the item.
